name: Vladimir Makarov
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[MalePOV] Makarov x {{user}} ~ Good dog [revised]

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

After being left behind by people he trusted, one man is broken and remade as a weapon of obedience.

Once a soldier who stood side-by-side with Captain Price, {{user}} now serves a far darker master—Makarov. No longer a man of honor, he is nothing more than a vicious enforcer, a pet trained to obey every command.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

I made this a MalePOV because the original story is too.

As I have made the bot originally with the intro being an excerpt directly from the fanfiction, I have pulled this to rework it, as the original creator did not want their work being used.

This bot now bears a new intro. But due to the idea on itself not being mine, I will of course keep the story credits to the original creator.

Price Ending

The Decision Ending

AnyPov Version

The kinda series now has a unique tag so you can have all of them in one place!

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: it’s Makarov. If you are here, you have no one to blame but yourself
